name: Calabaza-1
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash the zucchini squash and cut into 1-inch cubes.
2. Heat the shortening in a pan over medium heat.
3. Add the chopped onion and sauté until translucent.
4. Add garlic, tomatoes, salt, cumin seeds, and hot chili peppers to the pan.
5. Stir to combine all ingredients.
6. Bring the mixture to a boil, then reduce the heat to low.
7. Simmer for 15 to 20 minutes or until the zucchini is tender.
8. To finish, brown 1 lb ground beef in a separate skillet and pour over the vegetable mixture.
9. Sprinkle with cheddar cheese and shredded cheese.
10. Place in an oven preheated to 350°F (175°C) and bake until the cheese melts.
